title: dryopteris brunnea
intro: Dryopteris brunnea, also known as Brown Buckler Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The health benefits of Dryopteris brunnea include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
